title: MajorDiameter Result
description: Returns the major axis of the detected blob approximated to an ellipse.
notes:
Returns the major axis of the detected blob approximated to an ellipse. The unit is pixel.

The minor axis can be acquired by the MinorDiameter result.

See Also: MajorDiameter Result

MinorDiameter Result

Vision Objects: MajorDiameter Result

Blob

Defect Finder

Applies To

Vision Objects: Blob, Defect Finder
